hero.announcement: CLAIM YOUR RM 100 VOUCHER — CHAT WITH A DOCTOR NOW
hero.desc: Advanced GLP-1 weight loss injections — Mounjaro, Ozempic, Wegovy & Saxenda — prescribed and monitored by specialist doctors at Nexus Clinic KL.

intro.desc: At Nexus Clinic, every weight loss journey is individually designed. Our specialist physicians assess your unique physiology, lifestyle and goals before recommending the optimal GLP-1 protocol — ensuring you lose weight safely, effectively and for the long term.

treatments.title: Choose Your Treatment
treatments.t1Desc: Dual-action GLP-1 & GIP receptor agonist for superior weight loss results.
treatments.t2Desc: Clinically proven GLP-1 receptor agonist trusted by physicians worldwide.
treatments.t3Desc: Higher-dose semaglutide specifically approved for chronic weight management.
treatments.t4Desc: Daily GLP-1 analogue with a solid clinical track record in weight reduction.

howItWorks.title: Your Journey, Step by Step
howItWorks.s1Desc: Chat with our doctors via WhatsApp or book a clinic visit.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Your BMI, health history and goals are carefully reviewed.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Receive a tailored treatment plan with the right medication.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Regular follow-ups ensure safe, sustained weight loss progress.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: Are these weight loss injections safe?
faq.a1: Yes. All medications we prescribe are approved by regulatory authorities and administered under the supervision of licensed physicians at Nexus Clinic.
faq.q2: How quickly will I see results?
faq.a2: Most patients notice measurable weight loss within 4–8 weeks. Results vary depending on the medication and individual metabolic factors.
faq.q3: Do I need to visit the clinic in person?
faq.a3: An initial in-person consultation is recommended, but follow-ups can be done via telehealth for your convenience.
faq.a4: We offer a complimentary first chat via WhatsApp. Formal medical consultations are charged separately and can be offset by our RM 100 voucher.

cta.desc: Claim your complimentary RM 100 voucher and chat with one of our specialist doctors today. No obligation, just clarity.
